data.title: Consolidate static assets into server/public, drop GitHub Pages

data.body:
Goal: collapse the dual-deploy story (GitHub Pages at repo root + Go server with copied embed) into a single source of truth at server/public/. The Go server becomes the only deploy target; thankyoubag.online DNS will point at wherever the server is hosted.

User confirmed: canonical path is server/public/ (not top-level public/, which would require Go package restructuring since //go:embed can't traverse upward).

Scope:
- Move repo-root static files into server/public/: index.html, script.js, style.css, favicon.ico, splash.png, Helvetica-Black.woff, Helvetica-Black.woff2.
- Delete CNAME (GitHub Pages custom-domain artifact; DNS lives elsewhere now).
- Delete .github/workflows/* if any GitHub Pages deploy workflow exists.
- Delete server/tools/copy-static.sh (no longer needed — the embed path becomes the source).
- Update server/internal/httpserver/static.go //go:embed directive.
- Update README.md — drop the copy-static step from 'Run the server locally', drop the GitHub Pages framing, update the two-pieces-today architecture note.
- Update CLAUDE.md if it references the dual-deploy story (likely doesn't, but check).
- Verify the WOFF embed in server/internal/render/woff.go still resolves (it embeds independently from the static dir today; confirm no path break).

Out of scope: changes to deploy infra, DNS cutover, hosting platform choice. Those are operator concerns post-merge.

Implementation landed in 3 commits on server-setup:

- 1b5f887 TYB-14: refactor(server): move static assets to server/public
  git mv'd the seven repo-root assets into server/public/, git rm'd the
  duplicates inside server/internal/httpserver/static/, deleted
  server/internal/httpserver/static.go, added server/public/embed.go
  exposing public.FS(), and updated router.go to import the new package
  and refresh the empty-embed error message.

- c11ab1f TYB-14: docs(server): drop copy-static.sh and refresh README
  git rm'd server/tools/copy-static.sh; rewrote README intro, dropped
  the copy-static step, replaced the 'two pieces today' architecture
  bullet with the single-binary story, dropped the GH-Pages-cutover
  phrase from 'what's deferred', collapsed the dual-bucket repo layout
  into one. Also fixed two now-broken root-relative links
  ([index.html] and [Helvetica-Black.woff]) to point at server/public/.

- 5cf1b94 TYB-14: chore: drop GitHub Pages CNAME
  git rm CNAME.

Verification (all green):
  cd server && go build ./...   -> exit 0
  cd server && go test ./...    -> all packages OK
  cd server && go vet ./...     -> clean
  ./tools/run-dev.sh smoke      -> /healthz=ok, /, /style.css,
    /script.js, /favicon.ico, /splash.png, /Helvetica-Black.woff2 all 200.

Deviations from plan: none material. The plan-suggested README link
fixes for [index.html](index.html) and [Helvetica-Black.woff](Helvetica-Black.woff)
elsewhere in the doc weren't explicitly enumerated in the README table
but were obviously stale once the files moved; I updated them to
server/public/ paths. Flagging for the reviewer in case of disagreement.

Reviewer notes:
- server/internal/httpserver/static/ directory no longer exists.
- server/internal/render/Helvetica-Black.woff intentionally unchanged
  (renderer's private font copy, plan confirms independence).
- .claude/settings.local.json's dead copy-static.sh permission entries
  left as-is per the plan's 'out of scope' list.
- Variable name in router.go is now publicFS (renamed from staticFS for
  clarity; the plan said the rename was preference, not requirement).

Verdict: pass

What was reviewed: Three commits on server-setup (1b5f887, c11ab1f, 5cf1b94) consolidating duplicated static assets into server/public/ and dropping GitHub Pages.

Verification performed:
- go build ./... clean from server/
- go test ./... all packages pass (httpserver, printful, render, stripe)
- go vet ./... clean
- Runtime smoke test on PORT=8090: /healthz=ok, / =200, /style.css=200, /script.js=200, /Helvetica-Black.woff2=200, /favicon.ico=200, /splash.png=200
- /api/render returned a valid {file_id,url} (renderer's independent WOFF embed survived)
- First TYB-14 commit (1b5f887) builds clean in isolation - implementer kept the build green at every commit boundary.

Acceptance criteria walkthrough:
- No .html/.css/.js/.png/.ico/.woff/.woff2 at repo root: PASS (find at -maxdepth 1 returns 0 files)
- No CNAME: PASS
- No .github/: PASS
- No server/internal/httpserver/static/: PASS (dir gone)
- No server/internal/httpserver/static.go: PASS
- No server/tools/copy-static.sh: PASS (only run-dev.sh remains)
- server/public/ has exactly 8 files (embed.go + 7 assets): PASS
- server/internal/render/Helvetica-Black.woff unchanged: PASS (renderer's private copy intact, render test passes)
- go build/test/vet clean: PASS
- Runtime curls 200: PASS
- README scrubbed of copy-static, GitHub Pages, and "two pieces": PASS (only "github" hit is the legitimate resvg-go GitHub URL)
- CLAUDE.md and agents.md unchanged: PASS

Code-quality findings:
- server/public/embed.go: clean - explicit per-extension globs match the 7 assets, FS() returns the rooted fs.FS as planned, package doc explains the //go:embed `..` constraint that drove the design.
- router.go: imports the new public package, uses publicFS (renamed cleanly, no orphan staticFS refs anywhere), errEmbedEmpty error string updated.
- Git history follows correctly through the rename: git log --follow server/public/index.html shows commits before the move.
- README repointing of stray repo-root links to server/public/index.html and server/public/script.js (the two not enumerated in the plan) is correct.
- Commit messages all TYB-14 prefixed with proper conventional-commit shape; bodies explain the why.
- No emoji introduced anywhere in the diff.
- The two surviving copy-static.sh references in .claude/settings.local.json and .lattice/plans/ are explicitly out-of-scope per the plan.

No fixes required. Moving to done.
